title: Disclosure of resulting evaluation report
doc_html:
Art. 889.  Disclosure of resulting evaluation report

Copies of any reports of findings submitted to the court pursuant to Article 888 shall be made available to the district attorney and counsel for the child.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §8, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
